name: Disenchantment in Deep Shadow
four_pc: Increases Superconduct Reaction DMG by 80%. When the equipping character attacks opponents affected by Superconduct, this attack's CRIT Rate is increased by 16%. An all-new blessing may be obtained as you make your way toward Snezhnaya...

goblet.name: Ovations That Ceased Upon Festivity
goblet.description: It was a goblet of wine she had accepted in celebration from the hands of a colleague.

plume.name: Sharpness That Ceased Upon Wondrous Creation
plume.description: It was a feathered quill given to her followers, once used to pen the most absurd of dreams.

circlet.name: Pendulum That Ceased Amidst a Great Fall
circlet.description: It was a delicate trinket awarded to her in praise by the hand of her only master.

flower.name: Iridescence That Ceased Amidst Glory
flower.description: It was a flower made of silk, gifted to her by a friend whose hands were as cold as ice.

sands.name: Moment That Ceased Upon Waking From Grand Dreams
sands.description: It was a fleeting moment she gave a certain silent alchemist to remind him of every item on his schedule.
